subject: ken lay meeting with japanese prime minister

emails.subject: Re: Ken Lay meeting with Japanese Prime Minister
emails.subject_base: Ken Lay meeting with Japanese Prime Minister
emails.body: Re: Ken Lay meeting with Japanese Prime Minister Rosie please check Ken's calendar. This would be a great one to do if we can squeeze it in. Nick congrats on what looks like a great new opportunity to make progress. I am in all week and would love to talk to you and Joe. If we can't otherwise make schedules work, call me at home after hours Houston time (713-621-6550). Nicholas O'Day 08/27/2000 10:49 PM
